calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Erika Mccartney'S Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Wheaton, Esq, and Lowell Chow, Esq. 510-208-4555 of Environmental Law Foundation for Plaintiff.
Erin Keefe, Esq. 415-500-7700 of Blaxter Blackburn for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court raises his Concerns. Plaintiff argues and cites case. Defendant argues $47,000 in attorney's fees. The Court makes a suggestion and parties meet and confer in the hallway. After meet and confer, parties report they have agreed on an amount. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Erika Mccartney'S Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

Granted. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) Order and Consent Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and consent judgment for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court states questions for the record. There is a discrepancy in the amounts. The Court vacates the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY's Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

Continued to 3/22/19.*** The Court has questions on the amount being requested.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***The Moving party was informed by email at liz@rbhancocklaw.com re: continuance date.***
